title: Deploy and consume models with Azure Machine Learning
summary: Learn how to deploy a model to an endpoint. When you deploy a model, you can get real-time or batch predictions by calling the endpoint.

sections.title: Deploy and consume models with Azure Machine Learning
sections.summary: Learn how to deploy a model to an endpoint. When you deploy a model, you can get real-time or batch predictions by calling the endpoint.

lessons.title: Deploy a model to a managed online endpoint
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to deploy models to a managed online endpoint for real-time inferencing.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-model-managed-online-endpoint/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy a model to a managed online endpoint

lessons.title: Deploy a model to a batch endpoint
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to deploy models to a batch endpoint. When you invoke a batch endpoint, you trigger a batch scoring job.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-model-batch-endpoint/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy a model to a batch endpoint

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deploy and consume models with Azure Machine Learning
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deploy and consume models with Azure Machine Learning**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
